title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama for chat, tools, embeddings, and retrieval.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, multi-user, RAG, plugins).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder-style APIs and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma; ingest PDFs and chat over documents offline.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting, history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing reproducible Ollama binaries and module for NixOS machines.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, dependency injection helpers, and minimal API sample.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama containers inside CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered apps.

title: ollama-go
summary: Community-maintained Go client library for Ollama with context cancellation and streaming.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of ready-made docker-compose stacks pairing Ollama with Open-WebUI, LibreChat, n8n, etc.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you run local LLM prompts inside your vault for summarization and Q&A.

title: ollama-huggingface
summary: Hugging Face space template to serve any GGUF model via Ollama in a single click.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot that proxies chats to your local Ollama instance with per-user model selection.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord.py bot bringing Ollama completions and slash commands to any Discord server.
